name: Canvas LMS
description: Canvas LMS by Instructure is a learning management system used by schools and universities. Its REST API provides programmatic access to courses, assignments, submissions, grades, enrollments, and user data. All responses are JSON over HTTPS with OAuth2 authentication.

capabilities.name: list_courses
capabilities.description: Retrieve all courses the authenticated user is enrolled in, including active, completed, and upcoming courses.

capabilities.name: list_assignments
capabilities.description: List all assignments for a specific course, including due dates, point values, and submission types.

capabilities.name: submit_assignment
capabilities.description: Submit work for a specific assignment on behalf of a student, supporting text, URLs, and file uploads.

capabilities.name: get_grades
capabilities.description: Retrieve the grades and enrollment details for a student in a specific course.

capabilities.name: list_enrollments
capabilities.description: List all enrollments for a course or user, showing who is enrolled and in what role (student, teacher, TA).

capabilities.name: create_announcement
capabilities.description: Post a new announcement to a course that all enrolled students and instructors can see.

capabilities.name: get_user_profile
capabilities.description: Retrieve the profile and account details of a specific user or the currently authenticated user.
